lines: ROAD CLOSED. The ruin keeps its own dead now.
Closed since the night the master's fire went out.
Master Corvan is gone. The beast took the Emberheart.
The nights grow colder. Bring back the fire, Aden.
I still trim the lamps at dusk. Habit, I suppose.
When the Emberheart burns again, we won't need them.
Something has clawed over the words:
YOUR MASTER TASTED OF ASH. COME AND BURN LONGER. - C
THE WISPS SING FOR ME, SPARK. THEIR LIGHT IS MINE TOO. - C
The door is scored with deep claw-marks:
BRING ME YOUR LIGHT, SPARK. I AM STILL HUNGRY. - C
